message:
fix: no_merge ProcessResult sends spurious MERGE_FAILED nudges (gas-rn0n)

Add NoMerge flag to ProcessResult so callers can distinguish an
intentionally blocked merge from a real failure. processSingleMR
now dequeues silently and HandleMRInfoFailure returns early without
nudging the polecat or mayor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
